description: Claude OS Runtime profiles inspired by Mycelium tool profiles. Profiles reduce context and command surface without changing runtime behavior.

profiles.purpose: Small-context operation: only the safest, cheapest routing and status tools.
Operational project work: health, routing, docs, workflow, bootstrap and update.
Release-grade validation for CI and human-gated changes; `validate -Profile strict` runs skills manifest/structure/economy/drift (strict drift), bootstrap, and `os-validate-all -Strict`.
Full runtime surface for maintainers; `validate` uses the same skills + adapter gates as profile selection (quick / standard / strict).
